concept.description: Labels all methods which are annotated with "javax.transaction.Transactional" with "JEE" and "Transactional".
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(transactionalMethod:Method), (transactionalMethod:Java:Method)-[:INHERITED_FROM*0..]->(definedMethod:Java:Method)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(annotation:Java:Annotation), (annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type {fqn: 'javax.transaction.Transactional'}) WHERE NOT definedMethod.visibility = "private" OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(propagation:Value {name: 'value'})-[:IS]->(propagationType:Java:Field) OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(configurationParameter:Value) WHERE // transaction configuration parameters besides the propagation configurationParameter.name <> "value" WITH type, transactionalMethod, COALESCE(SPLIT(propagationType.signature,' ')[1], 'REQUIRED') AS effectivePropagationType, CASE WHEN configurationParameter IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS additionalTransactionConfiguration SET transactionalMethod:JEE:Transactional SET transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation = effectivePropagationType SET transactionalMethod.additionalTransactionConfiguration = additionalTransactionConfiguration RETURN type as Type, transactionalMethod as TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation AS TransactionPropagation, transactionalMethod.additionalTransactionConfiguration

concept.description: Labels methods of classes which are directly or indirectly annotated with "javax.transaction.Transactional" with "JEE" and "Transactional".
concept.cypher: MATCH (transactionalClass:Type)-[:EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS*0..]->(:Type)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(annotation:Java:Annotation), (annotation)-[:OF_TYPE]->(annotationType:Type {fqn: 'javax.transaction.Transactional'}), (transactionalClass)-[:DECLARES]->(definedMethod:Java:Method)<-[:INHERITED_FROM*0..]-(transactionalMethod:Java:Method) WHERE NOT ( definedMethod:Constructor OR (definedMethod.static IS NOT NULL and definedMethod.static) OR definedMethod.visibility = "private" ) OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(propagation:Value {name: 'value'})-[:IS]->(propagationType:Java:Field) OPTIONAL MATCH (annotation)-[:HAS]->(configurationParameter:Value) WHERE // transaction configuration parameters besides the propagation configurationParameter.name <> "value" WITH transactionalClass, transactionalMethod, COALESCE(SPLIT(propagationType.signature,' ')[1], 'REQUIRED') AS effectivePropagationType, CASE WHEN configurationParameter IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS additionalTransactionConfiguration SET transactionalMethod:JEE:Transactional SET transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation = effectivePropagationType SET transactionalMethod.additionalTransactionConfiguration = additionalTransactionConfiguration RETURN transactionalClass as TransactionalClass, transactionalMethod as TransactionalMethod, transactionalMethod.transactionPropagation AS TransactionPropagation, transactionalMethod.additionalTransactionConfiguration AS AdditionalTransactionConfiguration
